title: About the Department of Administrative Affairs
content:
About the Department of Administrative Affairs

The Department of Administrative Affairs ensures the coordination of all transportation, catering, cleaning, security services and technical maintenance and repair activities within the university.

It organizes these units in a way to increase the quality of life within the university.

ADMINISTRATIVE AFFAIRS CONTACT E-MAIL:

satinalmagrup@uskudar.edu.tr
